nasb.text: and they began to come up to Him and say, “Hail, King of the Jews!” and to give Him slaps in the face.

esv.text: They came up to him, saying, “Hail, King of the Jews!” and struck him with their hands.

cnv.text: 然後來到他面前，說：“猶太人的王萬歲！”並且用手掌打他。

ccb.text: 来到祂面前说：“犹太人的王万岁！”然后又用手掌打祂。

csbs.text: 他们不断地来到他面前说：“万岁，犹太人的王！”又不住地用手掌打他。
